zh.lifeSummary: 當Lachlan Bronnach MacLean 7th. Chief of Clan MacLean於1394年出生在蘇格蘭阿吉爾易斯爾 本 姆爾時，他的父親Hector Ruadh MacLean 6th Clan Chief30歲，母親Marrion Mariotta Mor Campbell24歲。他於1430年之前與Margaret Maclean結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1463年4月12日在英國蘇格蘭享年69歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿吉爾。

nameMeanings.name: MacLean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McLean
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Gille Eáin, ‘son of the servant (i.e. devotee) of (Saint) John’. Compare Irish McAloon and McGlone .

History: This is the name of a major Scottish clan traditionally associated with the island of Mull, which claims descent from Gille Eáin na Tuaidh (‘Gillean of the Battleaxe’), who lived in the 13th century.

nameMeanings.name: Lachlan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Scottish Gaelic Lachlann (earlier Lochlann), said to refer originally to a migrant from Norway, the ‘land of the lochs’. The name was traditionally used only in families with some Highlands connection and still retains a very Scottish flavour. However, it has now acquired wide popular appeal, especially in Australia and New Zealand.

variants.name: Lachlann
meanings: From Scottish Gaelic Lachlann (earlier Lochlann), said to refer originally to a migrant from Norway, the ‘land of the lochs’. The name was traditionally used only in families with some Highlands connection and still retains a very Scottish flavour. However, it has now acquired wide popular appeal, especially in Australia and New Zealand.

nameMeanings.name: Bronnach
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Lachlan Bronnach MacLean 7th. Chief of Clan MacLean was born in 1394, in Isle of Mull, Argyll, Scotland, his father, Hector Ruadh MacLean 6th Clan Chief, was 30 and his mother, Marrion Mariotta Mor Campbell, was 24. He married Margaret Maclean before 1430. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 12 April 1463, in Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 69, and was buried in Argyll, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lachlan Bronnach MacLean 7th. Chief of Clan MacLean est né en 1394, à Isle of Mull, Argyll, Écosse, son père, Hector Ruadh MacLean 6th Clan Chief, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Marrion Mariotta Mor Campbell, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Maclean avant 1430. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 12 avril 1463, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Argyll, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lachlan Bronnach MacLean 7th. Chief of Clan MacLean 1394 in Isle of Mull, Argyll, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hector Ruadh MacLean 6th Clan Chief 30 und seine Mutter Marrion Mariotta Mor Campbell 24. Er hat vor 1430 Margaret Maclean geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 12. April 1463 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Argyll, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lachlan Bronnach MacLean 7th. Chief of Clan MacLean è nato il nel 1394 nel Isle of Mull, Argyll, Scotland, il suo padre, Hector Ruadh MacLean 6th Clan Chief, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Marrion Mariotta Mor Campbell, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Maclean prima del 1430. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 12 aprile 1463, nel Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a Argyll, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Lachlan Bronnach MacLean 7th. Chief of Clan MacLeanが1394年にスコットランドアルグイルイスル オフ ムルで生まれた時，父Hector Ruadh MacLean 6th Clan Chiefは30歳，母Marrion Mariotta Mor Campbellは24歳であった。1430年以前にMargaret Macleanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1463年4月12日にイギリススコットランドで69歳で死去し，スコットランドアルグイルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lachlan Bronnach MacLean 7th. Chief of Clan MacLean(이)가 1394년 스컷랜드 아그이 이슬일 프 뮐에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hector Ruadh MacLean 6th Clan Chief(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Marrion Mariotta Mor Campbell(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1430년 이전 Margaret Maclean(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1463년 4월 12일 영국 스코틀랜드에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 아그이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lachlan Bronnach MacLean 7th. Chief of Clan MacLean nasceu em 1394, em Isle of Mull, Argyll, Scotland, seu pai, Hector Ruadh MacLean 6th Clan Chief, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Marrion Mariotta Mor Campbell, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Maclean antes 1430. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 12 de abril de 1463, em Escócia, United Kingdom, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em Argyll, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lachlan Bronnach MacLean 7th. Chief of Clan MacLean родился в 1394 г. в местности исл оф мулл, аргилл, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Hector Ruadh MacLean 6th Clan Chief было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Marrion Mariotta Mor Campbell, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Maclean перед 1430 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 12 апреля 1463 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности аргилл, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lachlan Bronnach MacLean 7th. Chief of Clan MacLean nació en 1394, en Isle of Mull, Argyll, Scotland, su papá, Hector Ruadh MacLean 6th Clan Chief, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Marrion Mariotta Mor Campbell, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Margaret Maclean antes de 1430. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 12 de abril de 1463, en Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultado en Argyll, Scotland.
